caption: The video features a man seated in front of a backdrop that prominently displays the title "Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle," set against a lush, jungle-themed background with misty mountains and dense greenery. The man is dressed in a dark blazer over a white shirt, and he appears to be engaged in an interview or promotional event for the movie. He is looking slightly to his left, possibly addressing someone off-camera, and seems to be speaking or listening attentively. The setting suggests a professional environment, likely aimed at promoting the film.
